texto: An inclusive narrative structure provides the executive brain with the best template and strategy for the oversight and coordination of the functions of mind. A story well told, containing conflicts and resolutions, gestures and expressions, and thoughts flavored with emotion, connects people ad integrates neural networks
explicacao: Citação de Louis Cozolino sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “An inclusive narrative structure provides the executive brain with the best template and strategy…” articula inteligencia, narrative, neuroscience em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e trabalho.
